{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heart (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Heart is a magical artifact located on [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c32">''The Knight'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|It was better to say that than to tell him we’d left Visiria without the magical artifact we’d come for. "We had to get you off the planet first."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
